options.name: -help
options.description: Prints out the command usage

options.name: <DIEABSTRACTFILE>
options.description: name of die abstract file

options.name: -block_pin_layer_bottom
options.description: legal routing layers' name; used for block macros. If given, the layers below is not to be output to the die abstract. If not given, default value is the next layer down from the top routing layer

options.name: -block_pin_layer_top
options.description: legal routing layers' name; used for block macros. If given, the layers above is not to be output to the die abstract

options.name: -block_pin_minimum_size
options.description: This parameter defines the minimum size of pin that will be output to the die abstract. The pin's x and y dimensions must be at least this value

options.name: -block_pin_name_includes
options.description: This string indicates that only pins that contain the string value will be output

options.name: -bump_pin_layer_bottom
options.description: legal routing layers' name; used for bump macros. If given, the layers below is not to be output to the die abstract

options.name: -bump_pin_layer_top
options.description: legal routing layers' name; used for bump macros. If given, the layers above is not to be output to the die abstract

options.name: -constraints
options.description: This indicates that there are constraints in a file indicated by <filename>.

options.name: -die_shrink_by
options.description: This is the percentage by which the die should be shrunk. The default of 0 indicates no shrink. A typical shrink value is 10 (for a 10.0% optical shrink).

options.name: -die_thickness
options.description: die thickness; default = 0

options.name: -include_macro_obstructions
options.description: when given, LEF macro OBS shapes will be output to the die abstract. By default OBS obstructions are not included

options.name: -io_macros
options.description: This parameter identifies what I/O macros are to be written to the die abstract. none: it is only intended to do co-design at the bump level. design: only those I/O macros that are referenced in the design will be put in the die abstract. default is design. all: this abstract is going to be sent to Orbit for early feasibility planning

options.name: -io_pin_layer_bottom
options.description: legal routing layers' name; used for I/O macros. If given, the layers below is not to be output to the die abstract

options.name: -io_pin_layer_top
options.description: legal routing layers' name; used for I/O macros. If given, the layers above is not to be output to the die abstract

options.name: -io_pin_minimum_size
options.description: This parameter defines the minimum size of pin that will be output to the die abstract. The pin's x and y dimensions must be at least this value

options.name: -io_pin_name_includes
options.description: This string indicates that only pins that contain the string value will be output

options.name: -layer_details
options.description: when given, indicates that the layer details is to be output to the die abstract

options.name: -macro_obstructions_layer_bottom
options.description: <string> If specified, identifies the bottom layer for which OBS shapes are exported to the die abstract. The default value for this option is the top metal layer

options.name: -macro_obstructions_layer_top
options.description: If specified, identifies the top layer for which OBS shapes are exported to the die abstract

options.name: -no_block_macros
options.description: when given, indicates that the block macros is not to be output to the die abstract

options.name: -no_blockages
options.description: when given, indicates that the blockages is not to be output to the die abstract

options.name: -no_rdl_routing
options.description: when given, indicates that the rdl routing is not to be output to the die abstract

options.name: -power_routing
options.description: when given, indicates that the power routing is to be output to the die abstract

options.name: -power_routing_layer_bottom
options.description: legal routing layers' name; used for power routing. If given, the layers below is not to be output to the die abstract

options.name: -power_routing_layer_top
options.description: legal routing layers' name; used for power routing. If given, the layers above is not to be output to the die abstract

options.name: -rdl_routing_layer_bottom
options.description: legal routing layers' name; used for rdl routing. If given, the layers below is not to be output to the die abstract

options.name: -rdl_routing_layer_top
options.description: legal routing layers' name; used for rdl routing. If given, the layers above is not to be output to the die abstract

options.name: -scribe_all
options.description: This define the distance in microns from the die boundary to the edge of the silicon after being cut from the wafer. All sides

options.name: -scribe_east
options.description: This define the distance in microns from the die boundary to the edge of the silicon after being cut from the wafer. East side

options.name: -scribe_north
options.description: This define the distance in microns from the die boundary to the edge of the silicon after being cut from the wafer. North side

options.name: -scribe_south
options.description: This define the distance in microns from the die boundary to the edge of the silicon after being cut from the wafer. South side

options.name: -scribe_west
options.description: This define the distance in microns from the die boundary to the edge of the silicon after being cut from the wafer. West side

options.name: -sealring_all
options.description: Seal ring is a border around the die boundary that is put in pre-shrink. All sides

options.name: -sealring_east
options.description: Seal ring is a border around the die boundary that is put in pre-shrink. East side

options.name: -sealring_north
options.description: Seal ring is a border around the die boundary that is put in pre-shrink. North side

options.name: -sealring_south
options.description: Seal ring is a border around the die boundary that is put in pre-shrink. South side

options.name: -sealring_west
options.description: Seal ring is a border around the die boundary that is put in pre-shrink. West side

options.name: -version
options.description: the version number of die abstract
